notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Iván Herrera · Top 1
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Ketel Marte.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Tyler Freeman · Bot 5
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman reaches on a fielder's choice. Willi Castro to 2nd. Willi Castro advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Elly De La Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Luis Campusano · Top 5
notableEvents.detail: Luis Campusano reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Michael Massey. Ty France scores. Miguel Andujar scores. Fielding error by second baseman Michael Massey.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Jasson Domínguez · Bot 4
notableEvents.detail: Jasson Domínguez doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Jasson Domínguez to 3rd. Jasson Domínguez advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Andy Pages.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Andrés Chaparro · Top 6
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Chaparro singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead scores. Andrés Chaparro to 2nd. Andrés Chaparro advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Henry Bolte.
